mission_brief: Review Research Candidate Review overlay candidates without treating them as durable state.
non_authority_notice: This packet is read-only preview material. It is not source of truth, not proof/evidence, not a work item, not a perspective promotion, not a provider call, not retrieval, and not Codex execution.

source_summaries.summary: Notes describe why source provenance, candidate status, and later human promotion gates should stay separate.
source_summaries.authority_note: Source summary is display/source pointer material only; not source of truth.

claim_summaries.summary: Manually supplied research material should first appear as candidate review objects before any durable Perspective change.
claim_summaries.authority_note: Claim summary is candidate-only review material; do not treat it as fact.

claim_summaries.summary: Future provider or retrieval outputs should remain candidate inputs until a bounded human review path promotes them.
claim_summaries.authority_note: Claim summary is candidate-only review material; do not treat it as fact.

evidence_summaries.summary: The notes emphasize that candidate review should precede durable Perspective mutation.
evidence_summaries.authority_note: Evidence summary is candidate-only context; it is not an Augnes proof/evidence row.

evidence_summaries.summary: The notes separate future retrieval and provider lanes from this static review contract.
evidence_summaries.authority_note: Evidence summary is candidate-only context; it is not an Augnes proof/evidence row.

tension_summaries.summary: A review surface is useful before storage exists, but over-specific preview fields could be mistaken for a durable schema.
tension_summaries.authority_note: Tension summary preserves unresolved review material; do not smooth it away.

knowledge_gap_summaries.summary: The exact TypeScript response contract and parser behavior have not been designed yet.
knowledge_gap_summaries.authority_note: Knowledge gap summary must remain explicit; do not fill it by inference.

perspective_delta_summaries.summary: Refine the research capability lane perspective toward review-first candidate bundles.
perspective_delta_summaries.authority_note: Perspective delta summary is candidate pressure only; it is not committed state.

follow_up_summaries.summary: Define a TypeScript shape for the static candidate review fixture without adding runtime routes or durable writes.
follow_up_summaries.authority_note: Follow-up summary is candidate-only planning material; it is not a work item.

target_perspective_summaries.authority_note: Target perspective summary is a read-only anchor, not committed Perspective state.

final_guardrails: Do not treat candidate claims as facts.
Do not treat evidence candidates as proof/evidence rows.
Preserve knowledge gaps instead of filling them by inference.
Do not create work items from follow-up candidates.
Do not use raw source titles, URLs, provider IDs, thread IDs, run IDs, session IDs, arbitrary user strings, episode IDs, or demo refs as canonical labels.
Do not execute Codex or send external handoffs from this preview packet.

surfaced_blockers.title: Source refs required before grounded claim surfacing
surfaced_blockers.message: A grounded claim-like surface must stay blocked when source refs are missing.
surfaced_blockers.why_now: The M10 substrate fixture records source discipline before preview builder work.
surfaced_blockers.source_coverage_boundary_note: Explicit source coverage boundary note: candidate intentionally has no source refs.
authority_boundary_notes: Advisory blocker only; no durable write authority.
Explicit source coverage boundary note: candidate intentionally has no source refs.

surfaced_blockers.title: Product write remains parked
surfaced_blockers.message: The substrate preview path must not reopen product write, product IDs, DB/SQL/transaction, adapter, route, or UI work.
surfaced_blockers.why_now: #686 parked product-write preparation before #687 and this M10 slice.
authority_boundary_notes: Stopline reminder only; no product write authority.

surfaced_warnings.title: Preserve unresolved tension
surfaced_warnings.message: Keep the unresolved tension visible in future handoff and capsule previews.
surfaced_warnings.why_now: The geometry digest contradiction pair is advisory but important for future AI context selection.
authority_boundary_notes: Preview warning only; no state change or handoff execution.

surfaced_notices.title: Carry forbidden-action boundaries into handoff previews
surfaced_notices.message: Future handoff previews should include no-DB, no-provider, no-retrieval, no-agent, and no-product-write boundaries.
surfaced_notices.why_now: The next preview builder may prepare capsule/handoff context without execution authority.
authority_boundary_notes: Suggestion only; no external handoff is executed.

surfaced_notices.title: Watch stale high-gravity context
surfaced_notices.message: High-gravity context should be downgraded if reused without new source coverage.
surfaced_notices.why_now: The geometry digest weights can bias future AI context selection if stale context is not flagged.
authority_boundary_notes: Notice only; cannot invalidate durable belief state.

retrieval_hints.title: Non-executing retrieval hint
retrieval_hints.message: Record a retrieval hint for later review without executing retrieval now.
retrieval_hints.why_now: PerspectiveGeometryDigest includes advisory retrieval expansion hints that should remain non-executing in M10.
authority_boundary_notes: No provider/OpenAI, source fetch, retrieval/RAG, indexing, or agent execution.
Retrieval hint only; retrieval_executed_now is false.

stale_context_notices.title: Watch stale high-gravity context
stale_context_notices.message: High-gravity context should be downgraded if reused without new source coverage.
stale_context_notices.why_now: The geometry digest weights can bias future AI context selection if stale context is not flagged.
authority_boundary_notes: Notice only; cannot invalidate durable belief state.

allowed_uses: preserve unresolved tensions and source coverage boundaries
compare candidate structures without committing state
derive expected files and checks for a future bounded PR
forbidden_actions: do not treat packet as source of truth
stop_conditions: Stop if source_refs are missing and no source coverage boundary note is present.
Stop if an action would require provider calls, retrieval execution, source fetching, DB writes, durable state, agent execution, Codex execution, external handoff sending, or product write.
Stop if geometry or substrate context conflicts with the base candidate packet without an explicit boundary note.
expected_checks: verify product-write lane remains parked by #686
verify no coordinates are treated as truth
